stemHtml: Which statement relating to the stabilization of airborne weather radar antennae is true?

options.a: They are stabilized with respect to the pitch and roll axis but not with respect to the yaw-axis.
options.b: They are stabilized with respect to the pitch, roll, and yaw-axis.
options.c: They are stabilized with respect to the yaw-axis, but not with respect to the pitch and roll axis.
options.d: The pilot can choose the axes of stabilization with the system’s stabilization selector switch.
